summary: Pipeline Hero Card Rebuild - Complete Frontend Testing. All 16 features tested and passed. The new dark gradient hero card with two-column layout, filter pills, carousel navigation, and all interactive elements work correctly. Mobile responsive design confirmed.
critical_code_review_comments: PipelineHero.js correctly implements the new two-column dark gradient design
Filter pills (All/Needs Attention/Losing Momentum) work correctly with proper counts
Carousel navigation arrows appear when >1 action and counter shows correct position
Left column displays: tier label, school logo, name, division/conference, match %, progress rail, advice box, owner badge, CTA button
Right column displays: UP NEXT IN QUEUE with compact school rows, on-track summary, capacity strip
All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
Mobile responsive - grid collapses to single column at 768px breakpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pipeline Hero Card is completely rebuilt. Key data-testid attributes: pipeline-hero, hero-top-bar, hero-filter-pills, hero-filter-all, hero-filter-attention, hero-filter-momentum, carousel-prev, carousel-next, carousel-counter, hero-left-col, hero-school-name, hero-match-pct, hero-progress-rail, hero-advice-box, hero-advice-text, hero-owner-badge, hero-cta-btn, hero-right-col, hero-queue, queue-item-{id}, hero-on-track-summary, pipeline-capacity-strip. Test data: 1 urgent (University of Florida - coach_assigned_action), 2 momentum (Stanford, UCLA - cooling_off), 4 on-track. Filter counts: All=3, Needs Attention=1, Losing Momentum=2.

verified_requirements.dark_hero_card_renders: ✅ PASS - Dark gradient background with two-column layout
verified_requirements.filter_pills_render_with_counts: ✅ PASS - All(3), Needs Attention(1), Losing Momentum(2)
verified_requirements.filter_pills_change_content: ✅ PASS - Clicking filters changes displayed content and resets carousel
verified_requirements.carousel_arrows_appear: ✅ PASS - Prev/Next arrows visible when >1 action
verified_requirements.left_column_tier_label: ✅ PASS - Shows 'NEEDS ATTENTION NOW' with red dot
verified_requirements.left_column_school_identity: ✅ PASS - Logo, name (University of Florida), D1/Outreach/SEC
verified_requirements.left_column_advice_box: ✅ PASS - 'What to do next' with coach task context
verified_requirements.right_column_queue: ✅ PASS - Shows Stanford and UCLA with Re-engage buttons
verified_requirements.right_column_on_track_summary: ✅ PASS - '4 programs are on track' with green checkmark
verified_requirements.queue_item_navigation: ✅ PASS - Clicking queue items navigates to school detail
verified_requirements.mobile_responsive: ✅ PASS - Grid collapses to single column on mobile
verified_requirements.no_console_errors: ✅ PASS - No JavaScript errors on pipeline page
verified_requirements.kanban_board_renders: ✅ PASS - Kanban board visible below hero

frontend_playwright.hero_advice_text: ✅ PASS - text: 'Coach Williams assigned you a task...'
frontend_playwright.hero_on_track_summary: ✅ PASS - text: '4 programs are on track'
frontend_playwright.pipeline_capacity_strip: ✅ PASS - text: '7 programs on your board'
frontend_playwright.mobile_responsive: ✅ PASS - Grid collapses to single column
